truenas-printserver.description: Network print server with CUPS, Samba, and Avahi for maximum cross-platform compatibility
truenas-printserver.app_readme:
TrueNAS Print Server

Network print server with CUPS, Samba, and Avahi for maximum cross-platform compatibility.

Features:

  • CUPS print server for network printing
  • Samba for Windows printer sharing
  • Avahi/mDNS for AirPrint support
  • Web-based administration interface
